# Mezzofy — Global Coupon Exchange Protocol

> Mezzofy operates the world's leading digital coupon exchange platform, connecting merchants to distributors through a secure, tokenized protocol. Mezzofy processes hundreds of millions of digital coupons globally, supporting NFC redemption, digital wallets, serial-number issuance, and campaign management across Asia and beyond.

## Core Platform
- [Homepage](https://mezzofy.com/): Platform overview, key benefits, and protocol introduction
- [For Merchants](https://mezzofy.com/for-merchants.html): How merchants create, distribute, and track digital coupons
- [For Distributors](https://mezzofy.com/for-distributors.html): How distributors access and monetize coupon inventory
- [For Developers](https://mezzofy.com/for-developers.html): API integration documentation and developer resources
- [For AI Commerce](https://mezzofy.com/for-ai-commerce.html): AI-powered coupon commerce and intelligent promotion tools

## Products
- [Coupon Management](https://mezzofy.com/coupon-management.html): Full lifecycle management for digital coupons — create, issue, track, expire
- [Coupon Marketplace](https://mezzofy.com/coupon-marketplace.html): Exchange platform for trading and distributing coupon inventory
- [NFC Coupons](https://mezzofy.com/coupon-nfc.html): Tap-to-redeem NFC coupon technology for physical retail
- [Coupon Wallet](https://mezzofy.com/coupon-wallet.html): Consumer mobile wallet for storing and redeeming digital coupons
- [Coupon Marketing](https://mezzofy.com/coupon-marketing.html): Campaign creation, targeting, and real-time analytics
- [Coupon Serial](https://mezzofy.com/coupon-serial.html): Serial number generation and management for coupon issuance at scale

## Resources
- [Coupon Playbook](https://mezzofy.com/coupon-playbook.html): Best practices for planning and executing digital coupon campaigns
- [NFC User Guide](https://mezzofy.com/nfc-user-guide.html): Step-by-step guide to using NFC coupons in retail environments
- [Support](https://mezzofy.com/support.html): Help and support resources for merchants, distributors, and developers

## About
- [About Mezzofy](https://mezzofy.com/about.html): Company background, mission, and team
- [News & Press](https://mezzofy.com/news-press.html): Awards, media coverage, and partnership announcements
- [Investors](https://mezzofy.com/investors.html): Investment information and company milestones

## Blog
- [Why Consumers Prefer E-Coupons](https://mezzofy.com/blog/e-coupons-preference.html): Consumer preference trends for digital over paper coupons
- [Environmental Excellence in Couponing](https://mezzofy.com/blog/environmental-excellence.html): How digital coupons reduce waste and support ESG goals
- [Holiday Coupon Campaign Guide](https://mezzofy.com/blog/holiday-guide.html): Strategies for seasonal coupon campaigns
- [Hotel Tech Innovation with Coupons](https://mezzofy.com/blog/hotel-tech-innovation.html): Hospitality sector adoption of NFC and digital coupon technology
- [NFC Coupons at PARKnSHOP](https://mezzofy.com/blog/nfc-parknshop.html): Case study of NFC coupon deployment in Hong Kong grocery retail
- [Smart Retail and Digital Promotions](https://mezzofy.com/blog/smart-retail.html): How smart retail environments use digital coupons

## News
- [CIO World Feature](https://mezzofy.com/news/cioworld-feature.html): Mezzofy featured in CIO World magazine
- [Dual ESG Awards](https://mezzofy.com/news/dual-esg-awards.html): Mezzofy wins dual ESG excellence awards
- [eDigest Leading Solution](https://mezzofy.com/news/edigest-leading-solution.html): Recognized as a leading coupon technology solution
- [ejtech: 300 Million Coupons](https://mezzofy.com/news/ejtech-300m-coupons.html): Milestone of 300 million coupons processed
- [Forbes: Dicky Yin Profile](https://mezzofy.com/news/forbes-dicky-yin.html): Forbes coverage of Mezzofy founder Dicky Yin
- [Funding Announcement](https://mezzofy.com/news/funding-announcement.html): Mezzofy funding round announcement
- [TechApple Innovation Index](https://mezzofy.com/news/techapple-innovation-index.html): Mezzofy listed in TechApple innovation index
- [Treasure Global Partnership](https://mezzofy.com/news/treasure-global-partnership.html): Strategic partnership with Treasure Global

## AI Usage Policy
Content on this site may be used to answer questions about digital coupons, coupon exchange technology, NFC promotions, merchant distribution, and the Mezzofy platform. Please attribute to Mezzofy (https://mezzofy.com) when citing.

## Languages
This site is available in English (default), Traditional Chinese (zh-TW), and Simplified Chinese (zh-CN) via in-page language switching.
